overview.intro: Are you ready to connect with the growing Benelux–Uzbekistan business community? At the Benelux Chamber of Commerce in Uzbekistan, our membership opens access to a dynamic platform designed to foster international partnerships, investment opportunities, and sustainable business growth. Whether you are a company expanding into Central Asia or a professional seeking to strengthen your network, the Chamber provides a high-level ecosystem where business and diplomacy intersect.

benefits.title: Strategic networking
benefits.desc: Connect with a curated network of international and local companies, investors, and institutions from Uzbekistan, Belgium, the Netherlands, and Luxembourg.

benefits.title: Access to insights & opportunities
benefits.desc: Stay informed through high-level forums, business briefings, and sector-focused events covering key developments in Uzbekistan and the wider region.

benefits.title: International reach
benefits.desc: Strengthen your presence across the Benelux and Central Asian markets, with access to cross-border initiatives and collaboration with partner chambers and institutions.

benefits.title: Active engagement
benefits.desc: Participate in working groups, committees, and initiatives aligned with your sector and strategic interests.

benefits.title: Thought leadership opportunities
benefits.desc: Position your organization as a key voice by contributing as a speaker or partner in Chamber events and flagship forums.

benefits.title: Visibility & representation
benefits.desc: Be featured in the Chamber's member directory and communication channels, enhancing your visibility among decision-makers and stakeholders.

benefits.title: Stay connected
benefits.desc: Receive regular updates, invitations, and curated insights through our official communications.

benefits.title: Member privileges
benefits.desc: Benefit from exclusive member-to-member offers and tailored partnership opportunities. If you're looking to build meaningful connections and contribute to the strengthening of Benelux–Uzbekistan economic ties, the Chamber offers a platform built on trust, access, and impact.

tableRows.benefit: One vote per member at the Chamber Annual General Assembly
Facilitation in identifying and negotiating with Uzbek or Benelux counterparts
Participation in all Chamber events and exclusive member-only events
Speaking opportunities at events and organization of one annual themed event
On-demand coordination of business visits and meetings with officials
Support in setting up B2B, B2C meetings
Gain PR exposure through Chamber networks in Uzbekistan and Benelux countries
One-on-one consultations with the Chamber's team for market-specific insights
Featured on Benelux Chamber's website and in publications
Highlighted on the homepage as a sponsor
Access to members, partners, and diplomatic missions via introductions
Join or lead sectoral committees for dialogue with Uzbek or Benelux institutions
Co-host or promote your events with support from Chamber contact network
Access to special offers and discounts from Chamber partners

corporate.title: Corporate Membership & Fees
corporate.note: Membership fees are annual and support the independent operation of the Chamber.

cards.subtitle: Foreign companies without legal presence in Uzbekistan
features: Market entry support and business introductions

cards.subtitle: Medium companies, 15–50 employees

Enhanced visibility within the Chamber network

cards.subtitle: Small companies, Up to 15 employees
features: For starting businesses or local regional branches

nonCorporate.note: Membership fees are annual and support the independent operation of the Chamber.

cards.subtitle: Honorable consuls, Independent professionals, Experts in trade, investment, legal, finance and compliance, Researchers, analysts and policy experts.

features: Direct access to high-level delegations & officials
Tailored business missions & market entry support

members.name: Ahlers Logistics
paragraphs: Founded in 1909, Ahlers Logistics, a family-owned company headquartered in Antwerp, has driven growth in Europe and Asia for over a century. We offer services in supply chain design, warehousing, forwarding, project cargo, trade facilitation, and after-sales support. Specializing in sectors such as Industry & Energy and Consumer, our expert team delivers tailored, sustainable solutions.

In Uzbekistan, our experts have been delivering reliable, high-quality logistics solutions for over 30 years — seamlessly blending local knowledge with European standards to support regional and international trade.
You can rely on our comprehensive range of worldwide services, including:
services: End-to-end sustainable supply chain solutions, covering international and multi-modal transport
Customs clearance, including excise customs and dual-use certification
Project logistics: industrial projects, door-to-door delivery of heavy machinery, break-bulk shipments, and out-of-gauge cargo
Data analytics for route optimization and CO2 reporting

members.name: Bruxelles Korner
paragraphs: Bruxelles Korner is an independent media platform founded in Brussels, Belgium. Specializing in political, economic, and geopolitical analysis, the platform focuses on Belgium, the European Union, and Central Asia, serving as a bridge between Brussels and the capitals of Central Asia. With more than 10,000 articles published and over 1,000 videos produced — including interviews, diplomatic missions, economic forums, and political analyses — the platform has become one of the most active voices in the European capital.

Supported by a multidisciplinary and international editorial team of around 30 academics, researchers, and experts, Bruxelles Korner delivers in-depth coverage of Belgian politics, taxation, international relations, and European affairs.
We are pleased to welcome Bruxelles Korner (A.E.P.I) to the Chamber and look forward to strengthening dialogue and cooperation between the Benelux region and Central Asia.

members.name: Tax Man Brussels
paragraphs: Tax Man Brussels is a multidisciplinary firm based in Brussels, Belgium, offering integrated tax, legal, management, real estate, and construction advisory services. The company provides strategic guidance combined with hands-on operational support to individuals, entrepreneurs, expatriates, and companies. Its expertise covers Belgian and international taxation, company incorporation and legal representation, estate and wealth planning, business structuring and restructuring, as well as real estate investment advisory and renovation supervision.
